description: Red blunt toed shoes with central lace-up fastening and branding at the heel and sideFabric upper with eyelets on the side for ventilation and reinforced overlay at the heel collarPadded and cushioned inner and a soft footbedUpper adhered to the outsole3D Ultralite rubber outsole with hexagonal scooped grooves in the middle region and hexagonal ringed grooves in the toe and heel region
